indicators.name: open floor space
indicators.rationale: The open floor space allows for stretching and yoga poses without obstruction.

indicators.name: low ceiling height
indicators.rationale: Low ceiling height may limit the range of some yoga poses.

indicators.name: lighting fixtures
indicators.rationale: The lighting fixtures provide adequate illumination for yoga practice.

reasoning_summary: The open floor space and adequate lighting make this space suitable for yoga and stretching, but the low ceiling height may limit certain poses.
